name: Monteiro Aranha S.A.
summary: Monteiro Aranha S.A., through its subsidiaries, operates in the pulp and paper, petrochemical, and real estate sectors in Brazil. It is involved in the manufacture, export, and recycling of paper; and production and sale of wood in logs, as well as offers packaging papers, corrugated packaging, and industrial bags. The company also distributes fuel and LPG; produces ethylene oxide and its derivatives, specialty chemicals, fatty alcohols, and co-products; and operates liquid bulk storage carriers. In addition, it operates drugstores; and invests in and develops residential and commercial real estate projects. Monteiro Aranha S.A. is based in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil.
